chapter_title.en: The meaning of the witness and the witnessed, and the meaning of the Day for which people gather

text: حدثنا محمد بن الحسن، قال: حدثنا الحسين بن الحسن بن أبان، عن الحسين ابن سعيد، عن صفوان، عن يعقوب بن شعيب، قال: سألت أبا عبد الله عليه السلام عن قول الله عز وجل: " وشاهد ومشهود " قال: الشاهد يوم عرفة.

en.basel-kadem: 4. We were told by Muhammed bin Hasan, that he said: We were told by Hussain bin Hasan bin Aban, from Hussain ibn Sa’eed, from Safwan, from Ya’qoub bin Shu’ayb, that he said: I asked Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, about the saying of Allah, Exalted and Glorious is He: «And by the witness, and by what is to be witnessed» [85:3]. He said: The witness is the Day of Arafah.
